description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, tests and deploy. In the tests stage define a coverage job using the python:alpine image that runs "apk --update add git", "pip install coverage", "python setup.py install", "coverage run --source=kooki -m unittest discover -s tests/", "coverage report -m", extracts coverage via the regex /TOTAL.+ ([0-9]{1,3}%)/, and excludes tags. Also in the tests stage define a tests job using python:alpine that runs "apk --update add git", "python setup.py install", "python -m unittest discover", and "kooki", and excludes tags. In the deploy stage add an autoversion job using the nmartignoni/autoversion image with before_script steps "mkdir -pvm 0700 ~/.ssh", "ssh-keyscan -H 'gitlab.com' >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts", "eval `ssh-agent -s`", "ssh-add <(echo \"$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY\")", runs "autoversion.sh", and after_script "rm -Rfv ~/.ssh", excluding tags. Also in the deploy stage add a docker job using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service that only runs on tags matching the regex ^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$ (excluding branches), runs "docker login -u \"$CI_REGISTRY_USER\" -p \"$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD\" $CI_REGISTRY", "docker build --pull -t \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE\" .", and "docker push \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE\"". Finally add a pypi job using python:alpine that only runs on version tags, excludes branches, creates a ~/.pypirc file with the PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD variables, runs "python setup.py sdist upload", then clears and removes the file, and after_script removes ~/.pypirc.
